name: 2026-06-04 Political Commentary Third Plunder 25 Years TH
description:
Three plunder cases in 25 years.

Jueteng in 2001. Pork barrel in 2014. Flood control in 2026.

Two acquittals. The third just earned a Sandiganbayan arrest order.

Eh ano ngayon?

Still a sitting senator. Still on the ballot every cycle.

A vote is a hiring decision. The country keeps hiring the same resume.

Three plunder cases in 25 years.

Jueteng in 2001. Pork barrel in 2014. Flood control in 2026.

Two acquittals. The third just earned a Sandiganbayan arrest order.

Eh ano ngayon?

Still a sitting senator. Still on the ballot every cycle.

A vote is a hiring decision. The country keeps hiring the same resume.

Three plunder cases in 25 years.

Jueteng in 2001. Pork barrel in 2014. Flood control in 2026.

Two acquittals. The third just earned a Sandiganbayan arrest order.

Eh ano ngayon?

Still a sitting senator. Still on the ballot every cycle.

A vote is a hiring decision. The country keeps hiring the same resume.

June 1, 2026: Sandiganbayan Fifth Division issued an arrest warrant against a sitting senator (Jinggoy Estrada) for plunder over alleged P573M in flood-control kickbacks. This is the same senator's third plunder case in 25 years: 2001 (jueteng, acquitted), 2014 (pork barrel/PDAF, acquitted), 2026 (flood control, pending). Sources: Philstar, Rappler, Tribune (May 28 - June 2, 2026).
